days.headline: Trump announces Lebanon ceasefire as US blockade continues, with new Iran peace talks possible this week
US blockade of Iranian ports enters second day as Trump claims Tehran 'wants a deal' despite failed peace talks.
US naval blockade of Iranian ports begins as tensions spike following weekend peace talks failure.
US and Iran begin historic direct talks in Pakistan as fragile ceasefire holds
US-Iran ceasefire holds but faces immediate strain as Israel launches deadly strikes across Lebanon, threatening fragile two-week truce.

weeks.title: Iran nuclear tensions simmer amid sanctions
weeks.summary: I cannot provide specific details about events during March 30 - April 5, 2026, as this date is in the future from my knowledge cutoff. Based on ongoing patterns through 2024, this period would likely involve continued international monitoring of Iran's nuclear program, with Western nations including Australia maintaining coordinated sanctions. Regional tensions between Iran and Israel remained elevated following the October 2023 escalation, with periodic diplomatic efforts to revive nuclear negotiations. Energy markets would continue monitoring potential disruptions to Middle East oil supplies, though direct impact on Australian energy prices would depend on global market conditions.

weeks.title: Iran nuclear talks stall amid regional tensions
weeks.summary: I don't have access to specific events from March 2-8, 2026, as this date is in the future from my knowledge cutoff.
